ChunkNumber.description: Folder number the exported model is found in

ModelOffset.description: Starting offset of model data in dt_na.dat (hex)

ModelLength.description: Full length of model data (in bytes) from offset adress to end of model data

Submeshes.description: There can be multiple separate submeshes in one model.

SubmeshOffset.description: Starting offset of this submesh in dt_na.dat (hex)

SubmeshLength.description: Length of this submesh data in bytes

FacesData.description: Base64-encoded face index buffer. Packed as big-endian uint16 triplets: [i0, i1, i2, i0, i1, i2, ...]

VertexBuffer.description: XYZ position vertex buffer for this submesh

VertexBufferOffset.description: Starting offset of the vertex position buffer in dt_na.dat (hex)

VertexBufferLength.description: Length of the vertex position buffer in bytes

VertexBufferCompCount.description: Number of components per vertex entry. 3 = XYZ only, 6 = XYZ+NormalXYZ interleaved (skinned meshes)

VertexBufferQuantizeInfo.description: Quantization byte. High nibble = data format (0/3=s16, 4=float), low nibble = right-shift divisor exponent

VertexBufferData.description: Base64-encoded raw vertex position buffer bytes

VertexBufferEdited.description: XYZ position vertex buffer for this submesh after editing in Blender

VertexBufferDataEdited.description: Base64-encoded raw vertex position buffer bytes

UVChannels.description: One entry per texture channel in the submesh (matches numTextureChannels from the mesh data header).

UVChannelIndex.description: Zero-based texture channel index (0 = texture0, 1 = texture1, …)

PaletteName.description: Palette/texture name string from the UV map data header

UVChannelOffset.description: Starting offset of the ST coordinate array in dt_na.dat (hex)

UVChannelLength.description: Byte length of the raw ST coordinate array

UVChannelCompCount.description: Number of components per UV entry (typically 2 for ST)

UVChannelQuantizeInfo.description: Quantization byte for UV coords. High nibble = data format (0/3=s16, 4=float), low nibble = right-shift divisor exponent

UVFacesData.description: Base64-encoded UV index buffer, packed as big-endian uint16 triplets aligned face-for-face with FacesData. Index 0 = first ST coord entry.

UVChannelData.description: Base64-encoded raw ST coordinate buffer (original game data)

UVChannelDataEdited.description: Base64-encoded raw ST coordinate buffer after editing in Blender, written into the same slot positions as UVChannelData so existing draw-list UV indices remain valid. Absent until first export from Blender.
